case_title: BANSEMER, RONALD vs. NEWTON, RICHARD DOUGLAS et al

docket_entries.description: ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT NEWTON, RICHARD DOUGLAS
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT AND/OR NOTICE TO VACATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANSEMER, RONALD
PROOF OF SERVICE OF NOTICE TO PAY OR QUIT AND/OR NOTICE TO VACATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BANSEMER, RONALD

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWTON, RICHARD DOUGLAS TERRELL, MARK BASTILLE, TONY JUDGMENT FOR PLAINTIFF RONALD BANSEMER AGAINST RICHARD DOUGLAS NEWTON, MARK TERRELL, TONY BASTILLE FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES LOCATED AT 2347 MARKET STREET #4 SAN FRAN CISCO, CALIFORNIA. IT IS FURTHER ORDERED THAT THE PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANTS MARK TERRELL AND TONY BASTILLE THE FOLLOWING SUMS: DAMAGES AND/OR UNPAID RENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $958.86 COSTS PURSUANT TO COST BILL.
